title: SonoraClient
description: SonoraClient is a Client similar to others but it is completely customizable. You can add mods, remove mods and customize your own Discord RPC if you like to.
body:
![SonoraClient Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0647540a8b9dc6d64657e1d8796e1e6cf62ec177.png)
A minecraft client (modpack) for every age.
If you want to play with a client
where you can customize everything
you are completely right

play with the SonoraClient if
you want to customize the mods and
the discordrpc

Features & Setup

- ➕ You can add mods to upgrade your client - 🟡 The client (modpack) adds especially performance mods but also design mods like 3D skin layers but also advantage mods like shulker box tooltip, mouse tweaks, freelook and gamma utils - ➖ You can remove mods to have a lightlier client - 🔵 You can edit the discordrpc for own rpc client - type `win + r` to open a execute window - type `%appdata%` to open the directory - now check your launcher, in my case it is the Prismlauncher, so click on the directory called `PrismLauncher` - click on the directory called `instances` > `SonoraClient ` > `.minecraft` > `config` > `simple-rpc` - now you have 2 files, open `simple-rpc.toml`

Singleplayer & Multiplayer

You can play with the client in singleplayer as well as multiplayer
You are able to add mods with an external database
if you want to use cosmetics mods or something else

If you use the SonoraClient you have a very customizable Client with performance boost and nice addons like freelook and Gamma Utils

Recommendation

- Use [prismlauncher](https://prismlauncher.org/) or [multimc](https://multimc.org/) - Windows 10 or higher - 8GB Ram - x64 architecture

Credits
